claim: LangSmith Agent Builder supports automatic email trigger setup; agents can listen for incoming emails and execute workflows without manual invocation
actionable: Set up email triggers in LangSmith Agent Builder to run agents automatically on email receipt; use 'Human in the Loop' to require approval before send/create actions
source_title: How I built an AI agent to automate my emails with LangSmith Agent Builder

claim: Sub-agents specialized for specific tasks (like calendar scheduling) perform better than single monolithic agents on complex workflows
actionable: Decompose agents into specialized sub-agents for narrow, well-defined tasks; use main agent to delegate and orchestrate sub-agents
source_title: How I built an AI agent to automate my emails with LangSmith Agent Builder

claim: Agents with message_user tool capability can ask clarifying questions and update their memory based on user responses, improving future interactions
actionable: Include a message_user tool in agent definitions to enable interactive disambiguation; use responses to update agent memory for personalization
source_title: How I built an AI agent to automate my emails with LangSmith Agent Builder

claim: LangSmith Agent Inbox provides centralized view of agent actions requiring approval; agents learn from user feedback to reduce future interruptions
actionable: Use Agent Inbox to review, approve, and reject agent-proposed actions; agents automatically incorporate feedback into future decision-making
source_title: How I built an AI agent to automate my emails with LangSmith Agent Builder
